requirement: The system shall meet the performance thresholds defined in this

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall process a standard search query and return results within 1.5 seconds at the 95th percentile under nominal load.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Nominal load is defined as up to 200 concurrent active users submitting queries at a rate not exceeding 10 queries per second per user.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The 95th percentile response time measurement shall be collected using distributed tracing instrumentation on the application server.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Distributed tracing shall use the OpenTelemetry standard and export to the organisation's approved observability platform.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The OpenTelemetry exporter configuration shall support runtime update without requiring a service restart.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall sustain a throughput of at least 500 transactions per second for bulk data import operations.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Throughput measurement shall be performed using the standard load test suite defined in the project test plan.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The load test suite shall simulate realistic data payloads drawn from the production data sample set.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Production data samples used in load testing shall be anonymised in accordance with the organisation's data handling policy.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Anonymisation shall replace all personally identifiable fields with synthetic data generated by the approved data masking tool.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall recover from a single application server failure and resume processing within 60 seconds without data loss.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Recovery shall be verified by the automated failover test in the CI pipeline before each production deployment.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The automated failover test shall simulate failure by sending a SIGKILL signal to a randomly selected application server instance.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall implement security controls that meet the requirements of ISO/IEC 27001:2022 and the organisation's information security policy.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall encrypt all data in transit using TLS 1.3 or higher.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: TLS certificate management shall be automated using the organisation's PKI certificate authority.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Certificates shall be renewed automatically at least 30 days before expiry using an ACME-compliant renewal agent.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The renewal agent shall send an alert to the security team if automatic renewal fails more than 5 days before certificate expiry.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The alert shall be delivered via the organisation's monitoring platform and shall trigger a Priority 1 incident ticket.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall encrypt all data at rest using AES-256 with keys managed by the organisation's key management service.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Key rotation shall occur automatically on a 365-day cycle or immediately following a suspected key compromise event.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The key management service shall maintain an audit log of all key creation, rotation, and deletion events.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The audit log shall be stored in a write-once, append-only storage system to prevent tampering.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Write-once storage shall be implemented using the S3 Object Lock feature with Compliance mode and a 7-year retention period.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall implement role-based access control (RBAC) with a minimum of four roles: Viewer, Editor, Approver, and Administrator.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Role assignments shall be managed exclusively through the identity provider and shall not be editable within the application.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The application shall re-read role assignments from the identity provider at each session establishment.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall meet usability requirements as validated by a representative sample of end users during acceptance testing.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall conform to WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility standards for all web-based interfaces.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Accessibility conformance shall be verified using an automated accessibility scanning tool as part of the CI pipeline.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The CI accessibility scan shall flag any new WCAG 2.1 Level AA violation as a build failure.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Exceptions to the build failure rule may be approved by the accessibility lead and recorded in the exception register.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Each exception entry shall include: the violated criterion, the justification, the approving authority, and an expected resolution date.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall allow a first-time user to complete the standard onboarding workflow without external assistance within 15 minutes.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The onboarding workflow is defined as: account creation, first login, completion of the guided project setup wizard, and creation of the first requirement artefact.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The guided project setup wizard shall consist of no more than 5 steps, each displayed on a dedicated screen.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Each wizard step shall display contextual help text and a link to the relevant section of the user documentation.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: User documentation links in the wizard shall be validated automatically in the CI pipeline to detect broken links before each release.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall provide integration interfaces supporting data exchange with IBM Engineering Lifecycle Management tools.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall expose an OSLC Requirements Management 2.0 compliant API for integration with external tools.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The OSLC API shall support creation, retrieval, update, and deletion of requirement resources.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: OSLC resource creation shall return an HTTP 201 Created response with the new resource URL in the Location header.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The Location header URL shall be stable and shall not change if the resource is subsequently moved within the project hierarchy.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Resource URL stability shall be maintained through a redirect mechanism if an internal ID change is required due to module restructuring.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall support import and export of requirements in ReqIF 1.0.1 format.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The ReqIF export shall include all custom attribute definitions and their enumeration value sets.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Enumeration value sets shall be exported as ReqIF DATATYPE-DEFINITION-ENUMERATION elements.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The export shall preserve the display order of enumeration values as configured in the project type system.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: If the importing tool does not support ordered enumerations, the system shall log a compatibility warning in the export report.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall provide webhook notifications for requirement creation, modification, and deletion events.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Webhook payloads shall be delivered within 5 seconds of the triggering event under normal system load.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Failed webhook deliveries shall be retried using exponential backoff with a maximum of 5 retry attempts.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: After 5 failed attempts, the webhook endpoint shall be automatically disabled and the project administrator notified.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The administrator notification shall include the webhook URL, the failure count, and the last HTTP error code received.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall implement data management policies ensuring durability, integrity, and recoverability of all requirements data.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall perform automated database backups at a minimum frequency of once every 24 hours.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Each backup shall be verified by an automated restore test to a separate test environment within 4 hours of completion.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The restore test shall verify that all requirement records, traceability links, and baseline snapshots are present and consistent.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Consistency verification shall include a checksum comparison between the source database and the restored copy.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: If the checksum comparison fails, the backup shall be marked as invalid and a new backup shall be triggered immediately.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall maintain a full audit trail of all data modifications for a minimum retention period of 7 years.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The audit trail shall be immutable — no user or administrator shall be able to delete or modify audit entries.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Immutability shall be enforced at the storage layer, not solely through application-level access controls.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The storage layer immutability mechanism shall be validated by an annual penetration test.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Penetration test findings related to audit trail integrity shall be classified as Critical severity and remediated within 30 days.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall detect and alert on data integrity violations such as orphaned traceability links or missing parent artefacts.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Integrity checks shall run automatically every 6 hours and after every bulk import operation.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Each integrity check run shall produce a report listing all violations found, their severity, and recommended corrective action.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall be deployable on-premise and on major cloud platforms including AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud Platform.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall be packaged as OCI-compliant container images with all dependencies included.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Container images shall be scanned for known vulnerabilities using an approved image scanning tool before each deployment.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Images with Critical or High CVE severity findings shall not be deployed to production without an approved risk acceptance.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Risk acceptances shall be documented in the security register and approved by the CISO or designated delegate.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Each risk acceptance shall have a maximum validity period of 90 days after which it must be re-evaluated.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall support horizontal scaling by adding or removing application server instances without service interruption.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Autoscaling policies shall be provided as Infrastructure-as-Code templates for Kubernetes HorizontalPodAutoscaler.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The autoscaling configuration shall define scale-up and scale-down thresholds based on CPU utilisation and request queue depth.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Scale-up shall trigger when CPU utilisation exceeds 70% or queue depth exceeds 1000 requests for more than 60 seconds.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The autoscaling evaluation interval shall be configurable and shall default to 15 seconds.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall provide a health check endpoint that returns HTTP 200 when all critical subsystems are operational.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The health check shall verify connectivity to the database, the identity provider, and the key management service.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Each subsystem check within the health endpoint shall complete within 500ms to avoid false negatives under load.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: If a subsystem check times out, the health endpoint shall return HTTP

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The HTTP 503 response body shall conform to the RFC 7807 Problem Details JSON format.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall provide built-in reporting capabilities covering requirements coverage, traceability status, and change history.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall provide a Requirements Traceability Matrix (RTM) report exportable in CSV and PDF formats.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The RTM shall include all requirements in the selected module and shall show linked test cases and their current execution status.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Execution status shall reflect the most recent test run result at the time the report is generated.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The report generation timestamp shall be included in the report header to allow assessment of result currency.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Report timestamps shall use ISO 8601 format in UTC timezone.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The system shall provide a change history report showing all modifications to requirements within a specified date range.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The change history report shall be filterable by requirement ID, modifying user, date range, and attribute changed.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: Filter combinations shall be applied using AND logic; OR filtering shall not be required.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The user interface for the change history filter shall display the number of matching records before the report is generated.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: The record count preview shall update dynamically as the user adjusts filter parameters without requiring a full page reload.

section: section under all specified operational load conditions.
requirement: and include the name of the failing subsystem in the response body.
